packs_page_details.title: Choose the perfect plan for you
packs_page_details.description: Scale your digital ecosystem effortlessly with a flexible, credit-based workflow no quotes, no delays, just continuous performance delivered month after month.
packs_page_details.how_to_choose_desc: Selecting the right plan is simple : each subscription gives you  a monthly pool of points that powers your entire digital evolution. Every request whether it’s a new page, an automation, an AI integration or a design improvement uses points, giving you full control and predictable scalability. If your needs grow, you simply upgrade or add points. No quotes, no negotiation, no slowdowns just a streamlined, automated workflow that evolves with your business every month.

legal_notice.title: Legal Notice
legal_notice.description: Legal information and terms of use of Blue Valoris Tech.

editor.title: Site Editor
editor.content:
The site www.bluevaloristech.com is edited by Blue Valoris Tech, a company registered in Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
Address: N°60773, IFZA zone – Dubai Silicon Oasis, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
Email: info@bluevaloristech.com

hosting.title: Hosting
hosting.content: The site is hosted by Hostinger in USA.

intellectual_property.title: Intellectual Property
intellectual_property.content: All content on this site (text, images, logos, ...) is the exclusive property of Blue Valoris Tech or its partners.

personal_data.title: Personal Data
personal_data.content: In accordance with the RGPD, you have a right of access, rectification and deletion of your personal data.

responsibility.title: Responsibility
responsibility.content: Blue Valoris Tech makes every effort to ensure the accuracy of the information published on this site but cannot be held responsible for errors or omissions.

privacy.title: Privacy Policy
privacy.description: Information about the collection, use, and protection of your personal data.

data_controller.title: Data Controller
data_controller.content:
Blue Valoris Tech, registered in Dubai, United Arab Emirates, is the data controller for personal data collected on this site.
Address: N°60773, IFZA zone – Dubai Silicon Oasis, Dubai, United Arab Emirates.
Email: info@bluevaloristech.com

data_collected.title: Data Collected
data_collected.content:
We collect the following personal data:
- Contact information (name, email, phone number, company)
- Technical data (IP address, browser type, device information)
- Navigation data (pages visited, time spent, interactions)
- Data you provide through forms or communications

purpose.title: Purpose of Data Processing
purpose.content:
Your personal data is processed for the following purposes:
- Responding to your inquiries and requests
- Managing our commercial relationships
- Improving our services and website
- Sending newsletters and commercial communications (with your consent)
- Complying with legal obligations

legal_basis.title: Legal Basis
legal_basis.content:
The processing of your personal data is based on:
- Your consent for marketing communications
- Contractual necessity for service delivery
- Legitimate interests for analytics and service improvement
- Legal obligations for compliance with applicable laws

recipients.title: Data Recipients
recipients.content:
Your personal data may be shared with:
- Our hosting providers (Hostinger)
- Analytics service providers
- Email service providers
- Payment processors (when applicable)
We ensure that all third parties comply with GDPR requirements.

retention.title: Data Retention
retention.content:
We retain your personal data for the following periods:
- Contact inquiries: 3 years from last contact
- Customer data: duration of contract + 5 years for legal obligations
- Newsletter subscriptions: until you unsubscribe
- Analytics data: 26 months maximum

rights.title: Your Rights
rights.content:
Under GDPR, you have the following rights:
- Right of access to your personal data
- Right to rectification of inaccurate data
- Right to erasure ("right to be forgotten")
- Right to restrict processing
- Right to data portability
- Right to object to processing
- Right to withdraw consent
To exercise these rights, contact us at: info@bluevaloristech.com

cookies.title: Cookies
cookies.content:
This site uses cookies to:
- Ensure proper functionality
- Analyze traffic and user behavior
- Remember your preferences
You can configure your browser to refuse cookies, but some features may not work properly.

security.title: Data Security
security.content:
We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your personal data against unauthorized access, loss, destruction, or alteration. This includes:
- SSL/TLS encryption for data transmission
- Secure hosting infrastructure
- Regular security updates
- Access controls and authentication

contact.title: Contact & Complaints
contact.content:
For any questions about this privacy policy or to exercise your rights:
Email: info@bluevaloristech.com

You also have the right to lodge a complaint with your local data protection authority.

customer_support_page.title: Customer Support
customer_support_page.description: Get the help you need to make the most of Blue Valoris Tech services.

how_to_reach.title: How to Reach Us
how_to_reach.content:
Our support team is available to help you with any questions or issues:

Email: info@bluevaloristech.com
Phone: +44 845 287 2984 
Live Chat: Available on our dashboard (for active clients)

For urgent technical issues, please use the priority support email: info@bluevaloristech.com

ticketing.title: Support Ticketing System
ticketing.content:
All support requests are managed through our ticketing system:

1. Submit your request via email or dashboard
2. Receive an automatic ticket number
3. Track your ticket status in real-time
4. Get updates and responses directly

You can access your ticket history and submit new requests through your client dashboard.

sla.title: Service Level Agreement (SLA)
sla.content:
Our response times vary by plan:

• Pack START: 72h response time
• Pack LAUNCH: 48h response time
• Pack GROWTH: 24h response time
• Pack SCALE+: 12h response time
• Pack SUPPORT+: 12-48h depending on issue

Urgent issues are prioritized and may receive faster responses. Our SLA guarantees apply during business hours.

hours.title: Support Hours
hours.content:
Standard Support Hours:
Monday - Friday: 9:00 AM - 6:00 PM (GST - Dubai Time)
Saturday - Sunday: Limited support for urgent issues only

Public Holidays: Emergency support only

Premium support clients (SCALE+ and above) may have access to extended or 24/7 support depending on their contract.

delivery_details_page.title: Delivery Details
delivery_details_page.description: Understand how we deliver and evolve your digital services month after month.

initial_setup.title: Initial Setup & Launch
initial_setup.content:
Timeline for your first delivery:

• Pack START: 5-7 business days
• Pack LAUNCH: 10-15 business days
• Pack GROWTH: 15-20 business days
• Pack SCALE+: 20-30 business days (depending on complexity)

The initial setup includes:
- Discovery and requirements gathering
- Design and development
- Testing and revisions
- Launch and handover

You'll receive regular updates throughout the process.

evolution_model.title: Continuous Evolution Model
evolution_model.content:
After launch, your digital service evolves continuously:

Monthly Credits System:
Each plan includes a monthly allocation of evolution points that you can use for:
- Content updates
- New features
- Design improvements
- Technical optimizations
- Integrations

Unused points do not roll over. Plan upgrades give you more monthly points for larger evolutions.

workflow.title: Request Workflow
workflow.content:
How to request changes and evolutions:

1. Submit Request: Via dashboard or email
2. Credit Assessment: We evaluate the points needed
3. Approval: You approve the credit usage
4. Development: We implement the change
5. Review: You test and validate
6. Deployment: Changes go live

Typical turnaround:
- Small updates (1-3 points): 3-5 business days
- Medium features (4-10 points): 7-10 business days
- Large evolutions (10+ points): 2-3 weeks

Urgent requests may be prioritized for an additional fee.

hosting_maintenance.title: Hosting & Maintenance
hosting_maintenance.content:
Included in all plans:

• Secure hosting on enterprise infrastructure
• SSL certificates and security updates
• Daily automated backups
• Uptime monitoring (99.9% SLA)
• Performance optimization
• Monthly security patches

Maintenance windows (if needed):
Scheduled during low-traffic periods with advance notice. Most updates happen with zero downtime.

terms_of_service_page.title: Terms of Service
terms_of_service_page.description: Please read these terms and conditions carefully before using Our Service.

introduction.title: 1. Introduction
introduction.content: These Terms of Service govern your use of our website and services. By accessing or using our services, you agree to be bound by these terms.

use_of_service.title: 2. Use of Service
use_of_service.content: You agree to use our services only for lawful purposes and in a way that does not infringe the rights of, restrict or inhibit anyone else's use and enjoyment of the website.

intellectual_property.title: 3. Intellectual Property Rights
intellectual_property.content: Unless otherwise stated, we or our licensors own the intellectual property rights in the website and material on the website. Subject to the license below, all these intellectual property rights are reserved.

user_accounts.title: 4. User Accounts
user_accounts.content: If you create an account on our website, you are responsible for maintaining the security of your account, and you are fully responsible for all activities that occur under the account.

limitation_liability.title: 5. Limitation of Liability
limitation_liability.content: In no event shall we be liable for any indirect, special, incidental, consequential, or punitive damages arising out of or in connection with your use of the service.

modifications.title: 6. Modifications to the Service
modifications.content: We reserve the right at any time and from time to time to modify or discontinue, temporarily or permanently, the Service (or any part thereof) with or without notice.

contact.title: 7. Contact Us
contact.content: If you have any questions about these Terms, please contact us.

cgv_page.title: Terms of Sale
cgv_page.description: Please read these general conditions of sale carefully before making a purchase on our website.

application.title: 1. Application of Conditions
application.content: These general conditions of sale (CGV) apply to all sales of services and products concluded through our internet website. Placing an order implies the client's full, unreserved adherence to these CGV.

prices.title: 2. Prices
prices.content: The prices of our services are indicated in euros, all taxes included (TTC). We reserve the right to modify our prices at any time, but the services will be invoiced on the basis of the rates in effect at the time of the validation of the order.

orders.title: 3. Orders
orders.content: You can confirm an order after reviewing the final summary. Any order validation implies the acceptance of the price and the description of the services available.

payment.title: 4. Payment
payment.content: Payment is due immediately upon ordering. Payments are secured. We accept payments by Stripe.

delivery.title: 5. Delivery/Execution
delivery.content: The digital services ordered will be delivered or executed according to the timeline specified during the ordering process.

liability.title: 6. Liability
liability.content: Our responsibility cannot be engaged in case of non-performance or poor performance of the contract due to the purchaser, insurmountable and unforeseeable fact of a third party, or force majeure.

governing_law.title: 7. Governing Law
governing_law.content: These conditions are governed by the applicable laws. In the event of a dispute, an amicable solution will be sought before any legal action.
